01 about
about

I'm Gabriel Ben, a senior mobile developer building high-performance iOS & Android apps that people rely on every day.

Over 5 years and 6+ companies, I have architected and shipped scalable mobile applications across fintech, real-time systems, and consumer products, with deep expertise in React Native CLI, Expo, and TypeScript

Most of my career has centered on fintech: secure authentication with MFA and industry-standard encryption, KYC/AML flows built to pass regulatory audits, and onboarding experiences that lifted completion rates by 27%. I've taken sole ownership of core product areas — onboarding, wallet features, push notifications — and led as technical lead on a regulated fintech app, defining the standards a team builds on

02 projects
projects

Timon — Global Payments App

A cross-platform fintech app that lets users spend money like a local in 100+ countries. I took sole ownership of the Onboarding flow and Wallet feature suite, from the phone verification screen through to the live wallet dashboard, currency conversion, and international transfer flows.

FintechTravel CardsiOS & AndroidReact Native
App Store Google Play

Digitvant Pay — Fintech App

Served as technical lead for the microfinance banking app, building 20+ screens and components while defining architectural patterns and enforcing engineering best practices across the team. Integrated KYC/AML verification flows across 3+ user journeys, designed a secure MFA authentication system, and mentored 2 junior developers.

FintechMFBiOS & AndroidTech LeadReact Native
App Store Google Play

Shareduled — Beauty Booking App

A real-time beauty booking platform that connects customers with salons and barbers. I owned the full mobile experience, building real-time slot selection, in-app payments, loyalty rewards, and smart reminders with map navigation to the salon.

Real-Time BookingiOS & AndroidReact Native
App Store Google Play

Shareduled Business — Merchant Dashboard App

The merchant-facing companion app for Shareduled. I built the full dashboard experience, service & staff management, real-time availability sync, and pre-payment guarantee so salon owners can manage bookings, track revenue, and control their schedule on the go.

Real-Time BookingIn-app PurchaseiOS & AndroidReact Native
App Store Google Play
03 experience
experience
Timon · Delaware, United States
Senior React Native Developer · Sep 2024 – Present
  • Collaborate within a cross-functional engineering team to build a cross-platform mobile application, taking sole ownership of two core product areas: the Onboarding flow and the Wallet feature suite.
  • Designed and integrated an end-to-end analytics and event-tracking data pipeline tracking 10+ events, enabling product and engineering teams to make data-driven decisions with real-time user interaction data.
  • Improve user experience (UX) by optimizing app flow and implementing features that simplify user onboarding, increasing customer satisfaction and 27% increase in onboarding completion.
Shareduled · Ontario, Canada
Senior React Native Developer · May 2024 – Dec 2025
  • Translated 50+ UI/UX designs, wireframes, and high-fidelity mockups into pixel-perfect mobile experiences, ensuring consistency across iOS and Android platforms.
  • Worked with a group of 2 backend engineers to integrate 25+ APIs, ensuring smooth and reliable data flow between the mobile app and server.
  • Delivered 4 complex real-time features: Business Tracking with Google Maps API, live chat, push notifications, and appointment booking.
Digitvant MFB · Lagos, Nigeria
Senior React Native Developer · Feb 2024 – Apr 2025
  • Served as the technical lead for a regulated fintech mobile application, building 20+ screens and components while defining architectural patterns and enforcing engineering best practices across the team.
  • Partnered directly with product and compliance teams to integrate KYC/AML features across 3+ user verification flows, ensuring the app met all financial regulatory requirements and passed regulatory audits.
  • Designed and implemented a secure authentication system featuring Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) and industry-standard encryption, protecting the financial data of thousands of users.
